name: Importing Contacts from Infusionsoft/Keap Forms
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can automatically capture leads from InfusionSoft order forms and import them directly into Marketing Cloud contact lists, eliminating manual data entry and ensuring immediate follow-up opportunities. This integration streamlines your workflow by connecting e-commerce activity with email marketing campaigns, enabling you to nurture new customers and drive repeat purchases through targeted messaging."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When properly configured, form-based contact import helps optimize your email marketing effectiveness by ensuring no potential customers are lost in the transition between purchase completion and marketing follow-up communications."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Form Contact Import", "bold": true}, {"text": " option to import the contact information (such as email, first_name, last_name, etc.) from the Infusionsoft order forms into Maropost's list."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Setting Up the Form Contact Import Integration"}], "data-id": "setting-up-the-form-contact-import-integration"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Perform the following steps to set up the integration for importing contacts from Infusionsoft forms into Maropost's list:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Connections page, in the Infusionsoft tab, click Add Settings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Integration Types dialog box, click Form Contact Import."}, {"text": "\n"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkWpB.05T5g00000BkWpBEAV.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkWpB.05T5g00000BkWpBEAV.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Form_Contact_Import_Option.png", "width": 500, "height": 375}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name -", "bold": true}, {"text": " Enter a name for the integration settings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "API URL -", "bold": true}, {"text": " Enter the URL of your Infusionsoft account. For example, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://signin.infusionsoft.com/login?service=https://pd208.infusionsoft.com/?jwt=true", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://pd208.infusionsoft.com", "children": [{"text": "https://pd208.infusionsoft.com", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "API Key -", "bold": true}, {"text": " Enter your Infusionsoft API key. To find this key, log into your Infusionsoft account and select Admin >> Settings >> Application, then scroll down to the API section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Integrate with list -", "bold": true}, {"text": " Select the name of the list to which you want to add the contacts."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Thank you URL -", "bold": true}, {"text": " The URL of the 'Thank You' page where users are redirected after an order in Infusionsoft is placed successfully."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the Form Contact Import Settings dialog box, provide the configuration details for the integration and then click Save."}, {"text": "\n"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX63.05T5g00000BkX63EAF.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkX63.05T5g00000BkX63EAF.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Form_Contact_Import.png", "width": 500, "height": 375}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " You can select from or enter the details of the integrations as follows:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "After you've saved your configuration, you'll see the integration displayed in the list of integrations. Copy the full POST URL."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Next, log into your Infusionsoft account and navigate to Main menu >> E-Commerce >> E-Commerce setup."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Under checkout, click Order Forms. Then, click the name of your form, and a new page opens."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the Thank you page tab and then paste the post URL you copied from Maropost."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure that you have selected the \"Pass contact information to the Thank you page\" option."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click Save."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
